ADMINISTRATIVE RIGHTS AGREEMENT
This AGREEMENT between REAL ESTATE TRAINING INTERNATIONAL, LLC (“RETI”)
and MEGALODON MARKETING, LLC (“Megalodon”) is entered into May 10, 2017 and
amends the Agreement between RETI and Megalodon executed May 2, 2017 (“Original
Agreement”).
RETI hereby grants Megalodon access to administrative accounts (“Rights”) to certain social
media and advertising related accounts as described on EXHIBIT A to this AGREEMENT for
the purpose of planning and executing sales and marketing campaigns per the Original
Agreement.
These Rights are granted only for the express purpose of serving RETI per the Original
Agreement and granted under the terms and restrictions described in the Original Agreement. In
addition to those terms, RETI retains sole discretion to revoke the Rights at any time for any
reason. Should RETI choose to revoke such rights, Megalodon may receive verbal or written
notice of such revocation. Upon actual or constructive notice of such revocation, Megalodon
will discontinue using such administrative privileges, access, or otherwise that may have been
granted and/or available with such Rights. Upon termination of either this AGREEMENT or the
Original Agreement, the Rights will be automatically revoked if still in effect at that time. This
AGREEMENT may be terminated at any time for any reason and the Original Agreement will
remain in full force and effect if it is otherwise still in effect.
This AGREEMENT does not cancel, alter, or in any way supercede the terms of the Original
Agreement.
Megalodon Marketing, LLC Real Estate Training International, LLC
By: By:
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 2 --

EXHIBIT A
Facebook - brandonfink1991@gmail.com access to Business Manager with roles of Ad Account
Advertiser for the RETI or RETI affiliated company Megalodon Marketing ad account and Page
Editor for the Armando Montelongo and Armando Montelongo Live pages.
Facebook - username and password for armandojr@teamarmando.com account
LinkedIn - username and password for socialmedia@teamarmando.com account which has
access to both the Armando Montelongo account and the Armando Montelongo Companies page
YouTube - username and password for socialmedia@teamarmando.com account
Instagram - username and password for @armando_montelongo account
Twitter - username and password for @montelongo acount
Google+ - username and password for socialmedia@teamarmando.com account which has
access to Armando's page as well as pages for our business
InfusionSoft (crm & marketing/sales automation) - Admin user account
Stripe (payment processor) - Admin user account
Google Analytics - Edit, Collaborate, Read and Analyze access for
brandon@megalodon.marketing to the findbigpropertyflips.com property
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
